SELECT addr FROM ip_addresses WHERE addr >>= (SELECT net FROM network_ips WHERE net = inet '192.168.1/24');
SELECT addr FROM ip_addresses WHERE addr >>= inet '192.168.1.0/24';
SELECT addr FROM ip_addresses WHERE addr >>= inet '192.168.1.1/32' OR addr >>= inet '192.168.0.0/24';
SELECT DISTINCT addr FROM ip_addresses INNER JOIN network_ips ON ip_addresses.addr >>= network_ips.net WHERE network_ips.net IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_addresses WHERE addr >>= inet '192.168.1/24') AS count_in_range, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_addresses) AS total_count;
